title: Basic Global Thresholding Process
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step algorithm for basic global thresholding in image segmentation.
relationships: Process starts with an Input Grayscale Image and an Initial Threshold Estimate
Each pixel is compared to the current threshold T to separate into Foreground and Background groups
The mean intensities (m1, m2) of these groups are calculated and averaged to form a New Threshold
The process iterates until the threshold value converges (changes less than a delta Δ), producing the final Segmented Binary Image
